meaning: when (referring to future events, introducing وَقَعَتِ)
for its occurrence (referring to the Day of Judgment)
a feminine one who definitely lifts up/raises (contrasts with خَافِضَةٌ)
when (introduces what will happen when the earth is shaken)
the earth (subject of رُجَّتِ - was shaken)
the mountains (subject of بُسَّتِ - were crushed)
completely crushed to powder (describing how الْجِبَالُ/the mountains were affected)
and then she/it existed/happened (describing what happened to the mountains)
dust particles (being acted upon by مُّنۢبَثًّا - scattered)
and you (all) were (followed by أَزْوٰجًا ثَلٰثَةً - three kinds)
pairs/spouses (as the object being acted upon)
and so the companions (of الْمَيْمَنَةِ - the right hand)
of the right side (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ/companions)
companions (subject of الميمنة/those of the right hand)
of the right side (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ)
of the left side (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ - companions)
companions (as the doers of an action)
of the place or state of bad fortune
and the ones who race ahead
the ones who are brought near
a group (subject of this part of the ayah)
and a few/small number (describing مِّنَ ٱلْءَاخِرِينَ)
woven tightly (feminine, describing سُرُرٍ in the genitive case)
those who are reclining comfortably (on عَلَيْهَا)
upon it/her (referring to the couches mentioned in مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ)
those facing each other (describes متكئين/reclining ones)
he circles/is circling around (subject doing action to عَلَيْهِمْ)
upon them (serving them, referring to وِلْدٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ - immortal youths)
and pitchers (connected to أَكْوَابٍ before it)
definitely not (negates يُصَدَّعُونَ - they get headaches)
they are being affected by intense pain (from drinking wine)
away from it/her (referring to خَمْر wine mentioned earlier)
and not (negating يُنزِفُونَ - they will be intoxicated)
they become exhausted (referring to the people of Paradise)
and meat (connected to طَيْرٍ - of birds)
a bird (meat of birds mentioned in وَلَحْمِ)
they desire for themselves (what they want from the food mentioned)
and fair maidens (subject of the sentence)
the pearl (described by ٱلْمَكْنُونِ - the well-preserved)
they do/work (as a reward for what they used to)
useless talk (object of يَسْمَعُونَ - they hear)
and not (connected to يَسْمَعُونَ - they hear)
of the right hand (describes أَصْحٰبُ - companions)
of the right side (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ)
a lote tree (describing what is in جَنَّاتِ)
and a banana tree (followed by مَّنضُودٍ - layered)
arranged in layers, piled up (describing طَلْحٍ)
and a shade (described by مَّمْدُودٍ - extended)
abundant/many (feminine, describing and matching the case of فٰكِهَةٍ - fruits)
not at all (strongly negates مَقْطُوعَةٍ 'cut off')
endless (describing fruits in paradise that are never cut off)
and not (connects to لَّا مَقْطُوعَةٍ 'not cut off')
prevented (describing a feminine thing that belongs to something else)
lifted up (feminine, describing وَفُرُشٍ/cushions, in genitive case)
a creating/bringing into being (as the object being described)
and so we made them (female companions) [into virgins - see next word أَبْكَارًا]
loving wives (describing the women of Paradise)
of the right hand/side (describing أَصْحٰبِ - companions)
the left side (possessed by أَصْحٰبُ - companions)
what (questioning about أَصْحٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ - the companions of the left)
and scalding hot water (connected to سَمُومٍ)
absolutely no/not at all (negates بَارِدٍ and كَرِيمٍ)
cold (describing the shade in لَّا ظِلٍّ بَارِدٍ - no cool shade)
and not (connects to لَّا بَارِدٍ - not cold)
they were (describing their state before ذٰلِكَ)
those who are given luxuries (object of كَانُوا)
and they were (subject of يُصِرُّونَ - they persist)
they persist strongly (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in وَكَانُوا۟)
and they were (subject of يَقُولُونَ - they say)
is it when? (questioning what يَقُولُونَ/they say)
is it really that we? (questioning what يَقُولُونَ/they say)
surely ones who are raised up
the first ones (referring to previous generations mentioned in أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا)
and the later/last ones (object of إِنَّ)
surely/indeed they will be gathered (إِلَىٰ مِيقٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ)
appointed time (of يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ - a known day)
a day/time period (specific time of مَّعْلُومٍ)
indeed you all (addressing ٱلضَّآلُّونَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبُونَ - the misguided deniers)
those who are lost (subject of إِنَّكُمْ)
the ones who repeatedly deny/reject (subject of إِنَّكُمْ)
surely eaters (of شَجَرٍ مِّن زَقُّومٍ - tree of Zaqqum)
so they are filling up completely (subject of مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ)
from it (referring to the food/drink mentioned earlier)
so they will be drinking (of الْحَمِيمِ - boiling water)
upon him (drinking فَشٰرِبُونَ from مِنَ ٱلْحَمِيمِ)
and then they are drinking (the drink of thirsty camels - شُرْبَ ٱلْهِيمِ)
the intensely thirsty ones (object of شُرْبَ/drinking)
their hospitality (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in the context)
of the judgment, of the religion (connected to يَوْمَ)
we (subject of خَلَقْنٰكُمْ - we created you)
then why don't you (believe what تُصَدِّقُونَ says)
then have you all seen? (connected to مَّا تُمْنُونَ - what you emit)
is it you all? (subject of تَخْلُقُونَ)
or (connecting two questions: 'Do you create it or do We create it?')
the creators (in response to: Are you the ones who create it, or are We?)
the death (as object of قَدَّرْنَا - We decreed)
on/upon (connected to نُّبَدِّلَ - we will change)
your likes/equals (referring to those who will replace you)
in (something mentioned in مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ)
then why don't you (connected to تَذَكَّرُونَ)
so have you (all) seen? (asking about مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ - what you sow)
or (connecting two parts of the question: 'Do you cause it to grow, or are We the growers?')
the planters (referring to specific group in أَمْ نَحْنُ)
we wish/want (subject of لَجَعَلْنٰهُ - we would make it)
surely we made/put it (in response to لَوْ نَشَآءُ - if we willed)
then you all stayed/continued (after لَجَعَلْنٰهُ حُطٰمًا)
surely we are suffering loss (connected to إِنَّا - indeed we)
rather (contradicting what was said before and introducing نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ)
they are prevented (from getting their harvest, referring to نَحْنُ)
so have you all seen/considered? (about الْمَآءَ - the water)
is it you all? (who brought down مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ)
you (all) sent it down (object of أَنتُمْ)
or (connecting 'Did you bring it down?' with another implied question)
the ones who send down (plural) (subject of نَحْنُ)
if (introducing a hypothetical situation that didn't happen)
we made it (object of نَشَآءُ - we will)
intensely bitter and salty (describing what the water was made into)
Then why don't you (connected to جَعَلْنٰهُ - We made it)
have you all seen? (the النَّارَ fire)
is it you all? (questioning multiple people)
her tree (object of أَنشَأْتُمْ - you produced)
a reminder (object of جَعَلْنٰهَا - We made it)
so glorify! (as a command to one person)
Then not/So not (connects to أُقْسِمُ - I swear)
and indeed it (referring to the oath in لَقَسَمٌ)
you (all) know (if you knew the greatness of this oath)
the ones who have been intensively purified (who can touch this book)
the worlds (possessed by رَبِّ - Lord of)
is it then with this (Quran)? (connected to مُّدْهِنُونَ)
she reached (subject reaching الْحُلْقُومَ - the throat)
the windpipe (object of بَلَغَتِ - it reached)
and you all (plural) (looking at حِينَئِذٍ تَنظُرُونَ - at that time)
at that time (when تَنظُرُونَ/you are looking)
you (all) are looking (while حِينَئِذٍ/at that time)
from you all (plural object of أَقْرَبُ)
and yet (connects to previous statement while showing contrast)
then why not (connected to previous statement)
if (introduces condition for كُنتُمْ - you were)
those who are indebted/will be brought to account
if (introduces condition for تَرْجِعُونَهَآ - you return it)
and as for... (connects to إِن كَانَ that follows)
the ones who are brought close
and as for (connects to previous statement)
from/of (connects أَصْحٰبِ to what comes before it)
the right side (possessed by أَصْحٰبِ - companions)
he was (of مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ - from the deniers)
the ones who are lost/astray (acted on)
then hospitality (what is provided for guests)
boiling water (possessed by something mentioned before)
and the act of burning intensively (subject of sentence)
this (pointing to something nearby in إِنَّ هٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ)
so glorify! (in response to what was mentioned before)
